DbAppInfoProviderFileInfoProvider Property

One Identity Manager API Server
Service class object to lookup information about the html apps, plugins or themes present on host.

public IStaticContentInfoProvider FileInfoProvider { get; }

Property Value

Type: IStaticContentInfoProvider

Implements

IAppInfoProviderFileInfoProvider
Remarks
Even though the app infos are retrieved from the database, plugin declaration must be present in a local file.
